report.name: MONTHLY_PAYROLL_REPORT
report.description: Monthly payroll cost breakdown by department and job title

dataset.name: PAYROLL_BY_DEPARTMENT
dataset.sql: SELECT d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, COUNT(p.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS HEADCOUNT, SUM(p.SALARY) AS TOTAL_SALARY, AVG(p.SALARY) AS AVG_SALARY, SUM(p.SALARY * NVL(p.COMMISSION_PCT, 0)) AS TOTAL_COMMISSION FROM PAYROLL_VIEW p JOIN DEPARTMENTS d ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID = p.DEPARTMENT_ID GROUP BY d.DEPARTMENT_NAME ORDER BY TOTAL_SALARY DESC

dataset.name: PAYROLL_BY_JOB_TITLE
dataset.sql: SELECT d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, p.JOB_TITLE, COUNT(p.EMPLOYEE_ID) AS HEADCOUNT, SUM(p.SALARY) AS TOTAL_SALARY, MIN(p.SALARY) AS MIN_SALARY, MAX(p.SALARY) AS MAX_SALARY FROM PAYROLL_VIEW p JOIN DEPARTMENTS d ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID = p.DEPARTMENT_ID GROUP BY d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, p.JOB_TITLE ORDER BY d.DEPARTMENT_NAME, TOTAL_SALARY DESC
